description:
You are a forensic examiner tasked with initial triage of a seized USB drive. Document the physical characteristics of the disk image at /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd by creating a forensic case named 'Disk_Triage_2024' with case number 'INV-TRG-008'. Use the 'File Type Identification' module to identify physical and volume properties.

Write a triage report to /home/ga/Reports/disk_triage_report.txt using the following format:
DISK_IMAGE_PATH: /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd
IMAGE_SIZE_BYTES: <size in bytes>
FILE_SYSTEM_TYPE: <e.g., NTFS, FAT32>
VOLUME_NAME: <label, or NONE if blank>
SECTOR_SIZE: <size in bytes>
CLUSTER_SIZE: <size in bytes>
TOTAL_SECTORS: <count>
TOTAL_CLUSTERS: <count>
TOTAL_CAPACITY_MB: <megabytes, 1 decimal>

PARTITION_TABLE:
<index>|<offset_sectors>|<length_sectors>|<description>

FILE_STATISTICS:
TOTAL_FILES: <count of all files>
TOTAL_DIRECTORIES: <count of directories>
DELETED_FILES: <count of deleted files>
ALLOCATED_FILES: <count of allocated files>

Additionally, write a narrative summary of at least three sentences to /home/ga/Reports/triage_summary.txt. The summary must explicitly mention the file system type and whether deleted files were observed.
